description: Create a relational genealogy tree in TiddlyWiki using custom fields and a dynamic ViewTemplate for the family of Queen Victoria. Create five tiddlers tagged 'Person': 'Queen Victoria' (birth-date: 1819-05-24), 'Prince Albert' (birth-date: 1819-08-26), 'Victoria, Princess Royal' (birth-date: 1840-11-21, mother: Queen Victoria, father: Prince Albert), 'Edward VII' (birth-date: 1841-11-09, mother: Queen Victoria, father: Prince Albert), and 'Princess Alice' (birth-date: 1843-04-25, mother: Queen Victoria, father: Prince Albert). Implement a dynamic ViewTemplate tagged '$:/tags/ViewTemplate' that applies only to tiddlers tagged 'Person'. The template must display the 'birth-date' field, links to 'mother' and 'father' fields if present, and a dynamic list of children discovered via a filter expression that identifies tiddlers listing the current person as 'mother' or 'father'. Ensure no children names are hardcoded in parent tiddlers or within the template logic itself.
